_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 6 currently banned, 2585 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Total attempts up to 12420 (from 8809, +3611 new). fail2ban total bans 2585 (from 2494, +91). 216.180.127.200 now top attacker with 837 attempts. 80.94.92.x subnet remains persistent. Crypto-related usernames targeted (solana, sol, pmd). Standard botnet scanning, no targeted attacks detected.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 10 usages across viewer.js, upload.js, merge.js - all static templates or escaped via escapeHtml(). No user data injected unsafely.

upload_module_review.filereader_prototype_patching: LOW risk - temporary patch restored on loadend, only affects progress tracking

cgi_security.note: CGI location block in nginx but no cgi-bin directory or scripts in webroot

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed
notes: Full security review completed - 22 checks passed, 0 critical findings
Reviewed new merge.js module (TASK-005): properly uses escapeHtml() for filenames, validatePdf() for uploads, sanitizeFilename() for downloads
Reviewed upload.js module (TASK-003): memory budget enforced, FileReader patching is temporary and low-risk
All 12 JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write(). innerHTML used safely throughout.
SSH brute force increased +3611 attempts since last review (~2h ago). All standard botnet scanning - no targeted attacks.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (79 days remaining)
recommendations: LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for tasks.md
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config (no scripts exist)
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
